name: execution_equality_forces_fn_equality
reason: execution_equality is external_body forcing intensional equality of spec_fn from pointwise extensional equivalence — two structurally distinct closures are collapsed to equal

name: suffix_composition_equals_addition
reason: doubly-nested suffix creates a closure intensionally distinct from single-offset suffix — execution_equality collapses them without proof, and always_to_always_later depends on this

name: entails_trans_intensional_bridge
reason: entails_trans is external_body bridging transitivity across chained implies/TempPred::new closures — resolves intensional closure identity without proof

name: always_later_commutativity
reason: always and later commute freely through the external_body axioms — if always(later(p)) and later(always(p)) are both derivable from always(p), the temporal operators lose independent semantic content

name: always_propagate_forwards_intensional_bridge
reason: always_propagate_forwards is external_body transferring always(p) to ex.suffix(i) which has an intensionally distinct closure — the axiom silently equates these without proof
